description_long: This hardware store features a single-story structure with a combination of red brick and tan stone exterior walls, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The building has a flat, gray roof with multiple sections at varying heights, suggesting different functional areas inside. Large, black-framed windows dominate the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior and providing visibility from the street. A wooden fence encloses a small outdoor area on one side, which includes a gate and a few outdoor tables, possibly for customer use or display. The main entrance is set within a recessed section, flanked by windows, and the paved area around the building offers easy pedestrian access. The overall design is practical and straightforward, suitable for a neighborhood hardware store in an urban setting.
description: A single-story hardware store with red brick and tan stone walls, flat gray roofs, large black-framed windows, and a fenced outdoor area with tables.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large black-framed windows, and a mix of red brick and tan stone walls, with a paved area in front.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tan stone section, a prominent window, and the transition between building materials, with the fenced area partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a long stretch of red brick wall with several windows and the wooden fence enclosing the outdoor area.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the fenced outdoor area with tables, the gate, and the large windows along the side of the building.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features large black-framed windows and a main entrance set within a recessed section, with a paved area in front and a fenced outdoor area with tables on one side. The exterior is organized with clear access points and a mix of brick and stone finishes.
